texto: I should have been conceived during Woodstock
autor: it’s in my blood: that burning desire to turn an absolute on its head and see what’s underneath. I’m as random as I can be and as responsible as I should be. Attempting to fuse the two makes for interesting days.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it’s in my blood: that burning desire to turn an absolute on its head and see what’s underneath. I’m as random as I can be and as responsible as I should be. Attempting to fuse the two makes for interesting days. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I should have been conceived during Woodstock” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, chila-woychik, on-being-a-rat-and-other-observations, útil em momentos de on-being-a-rat-and-other-observations.
